commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Sat, exercising the same authority, as he had done in his father's life-time, chap. i. 53. (Calmet) (St. Augustine, de C. xvii. 8.) (Salien, the year before Christ 1033.)
The public assembly of Israel, convoked by David, had already sworn fidelity to him, 1 Paralipomenon xxviii. 1. (Haydock)
